docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JERONIMO, PEDRO AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, JOSE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
